“God said to Noah: The end of all flesh has come before Me” – “They would make oil between their rows; they have trodden winepresses and are thirsty” (Job 24:11).7This passage in Job is often interpreted as referring to the generation of the Flood. “They would make oil between their rows” – they would make small oil presses. “They have trodden winepresses and are thirsty” – even though they trod…
